items.title_original: Why Do SwiftUI Apps “Stutter”?
items.title_neutral: Why Do SwiftUI Apps “Stutter”?
items.excerpt: SwiftUI is a powerful tool that tracks every dependency in your UI and updates exactly what needs updating.
